/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libtrossen_widowx_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.so -o rosidl_generator_py/trossen_widowx_interfaces/libtrossen_widowx_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/trossen_widowx_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/trossen_widowx_interfaces/srv/_arm_mode_s.c.o CMakeFiles/trossen_widowx_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/trossen_widowx_interfaces/srv/_joint_modes_s.c.o CMakeFiles/trossen_widowx_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/trossen_widowx_interfaces/srv/_control_gripper_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/masterthesis/kaixi_crospi_ws/build/trossen_widowx_interfaces:/opt/ros/humble/lib: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so libtrossen_widowx_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so libtrossen_widowx_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
